recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco

recommendations.title: All Dogs Go to Heaven 2
recommendations.overview: Charlie and Itchy return to Earth to find Gabriel's Horn, but along the way meet up with a young boy named David, who ran away from home.

recommendations.title: Puss in Book: Trapped in an Epic Tale
recommendations.overview: After tumbling into a magic storybook, Puss in Boots must fight, dance and romance his way through wild adventures as he searches for an escape.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Reluctant Werewolf
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Shaggy is turned into a werewolf, and it's up to Scooby, Scrappy and Shaggy's girlfriend to help him win a race against other monsters, and become human again.

recommendations.title: Abominable
recommendations.overview: A group of misfits encounter a young Yeti named Everest, and they set off to reunite the magical creature with his family on the mountain of his namesake.

recommendations.title: The Monkey King
recommendations.overview: A stick-wielding monkey teams with a young girl on an epic quest for immortality, battling demons, dragons, gods — and his own ego — along the way.

recommendations.title: Onward
recommendations.overview: In a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

recommendations.title: Thunder Road
recommendations.overview: A police officer faces a personal meltdown following a divorce and the death of his mother.

recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! in Where's My Mummy?
recommendations.genres: Mystery, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang become involved in a supernatural mystery in Egypt.
